description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named QPDF Build that runs on push to main, master, build, and build/* branches, and on pull requests, ignoring changes to ChangeLog, README*, and TODO. The workflow has multiple jobs for different platforms: Distfiles generates a distfiles.zip prerequisite, Linux builds and tests on Ubuntu, Windows builds and tests on Windows 2019 with a matrix of tools and word sizes, macOS builds and tests on macOS 10.15, and additional jobs for AppImage, Linux 32-bit, Fuzzers, and Sanitizers.
